title: viola langsdorffii subsp. langsdorffii
intro: Viola langsdorffii subsp. langsdorffii, also known as Langsdorff's violet, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is a perennial plant native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to provide health benefits such as reducing stress and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Langsdorff's violet include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders.
